included_documents:
Documents Included:
Lageplan
Setback Areas Plan
Floor Plans (Ground Floor, Attic Floor)
Elevation Views (North-East & North-West, South-East & South-West)

Additional Information:
Notice: The approval does not replace the need to obtain other public law decisions and does not authorize the commencement of work.
Fee: To be determined in a separate notice.
Bauordnungsrechtliche Auflagen und Hinweise:
Notification of Construction Start: Must be communicated to the building authority at least one week before commencement using the online form.
Notification of Intended Use: Must be communicated to the building authority at least two weeks before intended use.
Additional Information: Further details available at the provided link.
Demolition Excluded: Demolition of the existing building is not included in this permit.
Separate Application for Demolition of Residential Space: Must be submitted to the housing protection authority.
Gardening Design: The front garden must be landscaped, and sealing should not exceed 30% of the total area.

Erteilte Abweichungen von öffentlich-rechtlichen Vorschriften:
Planungsrechtliche Ausnahme nach § 23 Abs. 5 BauNVO:
Errichtung der ebenerdigen Terrasse teilweise außerhalb der überbaubaren Grundstücksfläche (§ 23 Abs. 5 BauNVO 1962):
Justification: The exemption is granted as the terrace's extension beyond the building limits is urbanistically justifiable.

building_regulations_and_requirements:
Bauordnungsrechtliche Hinweise und Auflagen:
Construction Start Notification: Must be communicated to the building authority.
Validity: The building permit expires if construction has not begun within three years of issuance or if construction is interrupted for more than one year. It can be extended on written application for up to one year each time.
Tree Felling: The felling of the walnut tree with a trunk diameter of 15 cm and the plum tree with a trunk diameter of 10 cm is allowed and must be conducted by February 28 of the next year. These trees are not protected under the Tree Protection Ordinance.
Other Approvals: The approval does not replace the need to obtain other public law decisions.
Fee: To be determined in a separate notice.
Rechtsbehelfsbelehrung: You can appeal this decision within one month of notification at the office mentioned in the letterhead.
